work_experience_normalized.description: Consultant of national companies in oil&gas and renewable energy sector. Incharge of the creation of a new database model, improving company tools based on a web SQL database.

September 2015 - November 2015. Request for quotations and purchase orders assistance providing prices, availability, interchangeability and tracking status. SAP and internal software skills, multi-task and heavy data entries. Direct contact with international customers.

work_experience_normalized.position: Power Plant Engineer at Maintenance Department - Internship
work_experience_normalized.description: November 2014 - September 2015. Engine in-site diagnosis, interventions decision making, developing of technical reports and publications, management of external technical documentation (service bulletins, airworthiness directives, maintenance manuals). SAP management: factory big data analysis, tooling, component tracking & monitoring, task development and optimization (lean manufacturing), supplies analysis to further cost optimization. Software: Visual Basic programming to feed excel tables and time optimization, CATIA V5 mechanical design module (assembly, design, mold tooling & product functional tolerance). Experience and knowledge about Pratt&Whitney, Europrop (TP400) and Honeywell procedures and engines.

June 2017 - Present. * Apex (Java-style language), Scala. * Node.js, geolocation, API Rest. * Salesforce Lightning, Visualforce. * Heroku. * Git - version control. * Data mining, machine learning, mathematical analysis (matlab). * Geolocalization, routes optimization. * 2D clustering, classification and regression in python Jupyter.

November 2015 - June 2017. Internet of Things development engineer: PCB design, hardware and software specification and choices, testing, security, manufacturing, logistics, client side/web side, front and back end, documentation and certification) MySQL databases creation, management (phpMyAdmin) and data injection (PHP and Python scripting). C# programming: RF/Lot communication and serial protocols WPF visual applications with Mahapps.Metro framework C#mono compiler usage in Linux distros. Tools: Visual Studio Community 2017 & Monodevelop. Python: Server side applications (WebSockets, low level protocols, database scripts and lot data acquisition). Tool: Sublime Text. Linux shell scripting in Linux Debian and CentOS 7 distros environment. Full server management (.ini, .conf, logs, resources.. whatever is needed). LOT devices (RF designs, sub GHz communication protocols and power-saving methods). Electronic components knowledge.
